title: BlackBerry Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal Year 2026 Results
text: BlackBerry announced robust fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2026 results, marking continued improvement in profitability and growth. Q4 2026 revenue was $156.0 million, up 10% year-over-year. Full-year fiscal 2026 revenue was $549.1 million, up 3% year-over-year. The company achieved Q4 adjusted EBITDA of $36.1 million, a 71% increase year-over-year. Net income improved to $24.3 million in Q4 and $53.2 million for the full year, marking the eighth consecutive quarter of profitability improvements. The QNX division delivered record quarterly revenue and strong year-over-year growth. Secure Communications returned to growth with Q4 revenue of $72.5 million, up 8% year-over-year. CEO John J. Giamatteo stated the company has strengthened its fundamentals and is no longer in transition. FY2027 guidance expects 6-11% revenue growth with non-GAAP EPS of $0.15-0.19. The company maintained its strategic focus on QNX automotive, Secure Communications, and IoT segments.
